contained.name: CM_LabA_blood_LabToLoinc
contained.title: LabA codes locaux de biologie vers LOINC
contained.description: ConceptMap reliant les codes locaux laboratoire LabA pour le sang (COS-LabA-LabAnalyses) aux codes LOINC (http://loinc.org) utilisés dans la spécification Postman vers V1 en faisant le lien avec les codes Reference (COS-LabAnalyses) du code Mirth.

target.comment: marker=glucose; origin=mirth(mappingAnalyse); type=blood; note=GLU also appears as urine in mappingType
marker=alat; origin=mirth(mappingAnalyse); type=blood; note=mirth marker 'asal' aligned to ALT

name: LabA_OBR_to_LabReport
title: HL7v2.3 OBR to HL7 Europe Laboratory resource ServiceRequest, DiagnosticReport, and Specimen
description: Transforms an HL7v2.3 OBR segment into the HL7 Europe Laboratory ServiceRequest, DiagnosticReport, and Specimen resources.
